rationale: Materials L5 only for battery + photovoltaic chemistries + 2D materials + solid electrolytes + biomaterials where the field publishes by named composition. Skip rest where L4 IS the named family.

uncovered_concerns: Materials L5 only for battery + PV + 2D + biomaterials + semiconductors where the field publishes by named composition. Skipped polymer chemistry, MOF subtypes, structural metals — L4 already at named-family level for those.
